display.purpose: Fraunces serif for display titles and main KPIs.

body.purpose: Inter Tight sans-serif for UI, forms, and general prose.

components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #C8421C; color: #FFFFFF; font-family: 'Inter Tight', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; padding: 10px 16px; border: 1px solid #C8421C; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease-in-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #B03514; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: transparent; color: #2E2A27; font-family: 'Inter Tight', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; padding: 10px 16px; border: 1px solid #D6CBBF; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease-in-out; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #F3EFEA; }

narrative.overview: MO!D's visual language frames automated quality data within a highly structured, paper-like dossier or scientific journal format.
keyCharacteristics: Contrast between Fraunces serif and Inter Tight UI
Flat outlined card shapes and ban of glassmorphism
dos: Do align all numeric data columns to the right and use JetBrains Mono.
Do use standard SVG icons with a stroke width of 1.6 and size of 16px or 24px.
donts: Don't use emojis as visual markers.
Don't use backdrop-blur filters or semi-transparent glass cards.
